reviewedMilestones.evidence: 245 total segments, 164 strong candidates, 81 review-excluded candidates, 0 blocked candidates, 0 bearing-only candidates
county containment pass and fail-closed pass

runtimeReadinessReview.rationale: The reviewed runtime prototype, validation, service layer, and consumer evidence are complete enough to support a user-facing implementation milestone, provided display remains limited to the approved awareness MVP gates.

awarenessPlacementReadiness.rationale: V702 selected Top Awareness cards as the MVP placement because they support quick condition scanning and carry lower navigation implication when phrased as awareness text. Other surfaces remain deferred.

constraints: Only strong candidates may be surfaced.
All review-excluded candidates must remain hidden.
Any unavailable, stale, conflicting, or malformed confidence state must fail closed.

protections: Review-bucket presence is a display blocker.
Review-bucket labels must not appear in user-facing surfaces.
Review-bucket candidates must not be promoted into Top Awareness cards, detail cards, summaries, consequence cards, alerts, Route Watch, Destination Intelligence, or map labels.
County containment must pass before directional awareness is eligible.
County ownership must be valid for the active county context.
Containment failure produces no directional awareness, no labels, and no bearing fallback.
Bearing-only candidates are excluded from user-facing awareness.
Direction labels may not be derived from geometry bearing alone.
Accepted directional metadata and strong confidence are required.

userLanguageReadiness.rationale: The full-word cardinal labels are implementation-ready for awareness text only and must not be used as navigation instructions or map labels.

awarenessMvpReadiness.mvp: Directional Awareness Layer MVP for Top Awareness cards only
constraints: No Awareness surfaces beyond Top Awareness cards in the MVP.
No DriveTexas or Transportation Intelligence changes.
No route guidance, navigation, turn-by-turn, avoid, reroute, or alternate-route language.

remainingRisks: Users could interpret directional awareness as route guidance if wording becomes instructional.
Review-excluded records could leak if display gates are bypassed.
County-boundary or ownership ambiguity could create cross-county directional leakage.
Bearing-only data could be misused as a fallback if enforcement is weakened.
Future implementation could accidentally expand beyond Top Awareness cards.
unresolvedConstraints: User-facing rendering is not implemented in V703.
V704 must independently prove UI gating, wording, fail-closed behavior, and protected-system non-regression.
Deferred awareness surfaces require separate authorization.
requiredSafeguards: County containment and county ownership gate.
Bearing-only blocker with no fallback label generation.
Fail-closed response for missing, stale, conflicting, malformed, or unverifiable evidence.

nextMilestoneRecommendation.rationale: V704 should be the first actual user-facing directional intelligence implementation milestone, limited to the constrained Top Awareness card MVP.

finalDetermination: AWARENESS LAYER READY FOR IMPLEMENTATION WITH CONSTRAINTS
